topic: pickup basketball with the boys recap

turns.content: dude I am so sore rn I can barely move my legs we played pickup basketball for like 3 hours yesterday and I think im dyin
Three hours of pickup ball will do that to you, especially if you weren't warmed up. Are you feeling it more in your quads, calves, or everywhere?

bro everywhere. my quads my calves my lower back even my shoulders from shootin. I played way harder than I shoulda cuz my buddy was talkin trash all week sayin his team was gonna smoke us and I took that personal
Ha, nothing motivates like trash talk. Did you at least win after going that hard?
we went like 5 and 3 so yeah we won more than we lost but he got us in the last game and now thats all he wont shut up about. bro we won the day but hes actin like one game means everything
Classic. The guy who loses most of the games but wins the last one and acts like he's the champion. That's just how pickup ball works though -- the last game is always the one people remember.

facts bro its so annoyin. we play at this outdoor court near m street and there were actually some decent players out there yesterday too like some dudes who clearly played in high school or somethin. one kid was drillin threes from everywhere
M Street courts can be competitive depending on the day. Those random dudes who show up and just start raining threes are always humbling. What position do you usually play?
im not that tall so I mostly just run the wing and try to drive or shoot midrange. my three point shot is inconsistent on a good day lol but I can get to the rim if the lanes open

Driving and midrange is a solid game plan for pickup. Guys who can get to the basket are always valuable because half the people out there just want to jack up threes. Do you play often or more of a random thing?

we try to get a game goin every couple weeks when enough guys are free. its hard to get everybody together tho cuz everyones got work and stuff. yesterday we had 10 guys so it worked out perfect for 5 on 5

Ten guys is the perfect number -- full court 5v5 with no waiting around. That's tough to coordinate but sounds like it was worth it even with the soreness. For the pain right now, ibuprofen, lots of water, and maybe a hot shower or some stretching will help you recover faster.

yeah I took some advil this mornin and it helped a little but I gotta work today and im gonna be climbin ladders all day which is gonna be brutal. shoulda thought about that before I played 8 games of basketball on a sunday lol

Climbing ladders on dead legs is going to be a rough day for sure. Try to stretch your calves and quads during any breaks you get -- even 30 seconds helps. And keep drinking water throughout the day. The soreness usually peaks day 2, so tomorrow might be even worse honestly.

bro dont tell me that I cant handle it bein worse than this lol. alright I gotta get goin thanks for the advice im gonna stretch in the truck before I go in. we already talkin about runnin it back next weekend too cuz my boy wants a rematch
Of course he does. Get through today, stretch tonight, and by next weekend you'll be good to go again. Have a good one at work, take it easy on those ladders.
